candidate_definition_hints.text: Convert NIfTI volume to triangulated mesh using marching cubes

This tool converts a NIfTI 3D voxel image to a triangulated mesh. It can save meshes in in the GIfTI (.gii), mz3, obj, ply, FreeSurfer (.pial), stl, vtk, formats. You can use [dcm2niix](https://github.com/rordenlab/dcm2niix) to convert DICOM images to NIfTI. The software is writ…
